_instructions.structure: This file contains ONLY department info and semester metadata — no projects. Projects live in separate files named by semester ID (e.g. at-sem2-2026.json). The hub page loads only this file, then fetches individual semester files on demand.
_instructions.howToAddASemester: 1. Add a new semester object at the TOP of the correct department's 'semesters' array. 2. Set 'current: true' and set the old current semester to 'current: false'. 3. Create a matching file in data/studentwork/ named with the semester ID (e.g. ent-sem1-2027.json).
_instructions.howToAddADepartment: Add a new department object to the 'departments' array. Then create semester files for it.

departments.label: Applied Technologies
departments.description: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, APIs, and full web projects.

departments.label: Digital Media
departments.description: Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma, and visual storytelling.

departments.label: Business
departments.description: Business plans, pitch decks, market research, and financial models.

departments.label: Entrepreneurship
departments.description: Ideation, lean startup methodology, pitching, and building real ventures.
